headlines.headline: Zrovex Industries sees 10% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 10% drop in new customer orders indicates a significant decline in demand that will likely impact revenue immediately and persist through the quarter.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
